title: Citrusy Comforting Ukrainian Pierogi Bake
description: A pillowy and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring white chocolate and coconut cream, perfect for a sweet treat. This recipe is sugar-free friendly and can be made in under an hour.
instructions: Roll out the pierogi dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Use a cookie cutter or a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a spoonful of white chocolate chips and a sprinkle of coconut cream in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Place the pierogi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each pierogi.
Dot the tops of the pierogi with melted butter and sprinkle with granulated sweetener.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the pierogi are golden brown and the filling is melted.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
